message:
web: Add AI-generated summaries for transcripts

Generate short titles for transcripts using Gemini 3 Flash via OpenRouter.
Summary generation runs in parallel with R2 uploads during ingest, so
transcripts appear with summaries ready. Existing summaries are preserved
on re-upload.

- Add summary field to unified transcript schema
- Add summarizer module using Vercel AI SDK + OpenRouter
- Run summary generation in parallel with R2/blob uploads
- Add migration for summary column in transcripts table
- Remove unused firstSummary extraction from Claude Code parser

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/2c36763c-383c-4c39-a5ab-0f9a338be422

files.patch:
@@ -269,6 +269,7 @@ export function convertClaudeCodeTranscript(
     source: "claude-code" as const,
     timestamp,
     preview: previewMessage,
+    summary: null,
     model: primaryModel,
     blendedTokens,
     costUsd,
@@ -340,6 +341,7 @@ export async function convertClaudeCodeFile(
     source: "claude-code" as const,
     timestamp,
     preview: previewMessage,
+    summary: null,
     model: primaryModel,
     blendedTokens,
     costUsd,

@@ -346,6 +346,7 @@ export function convertCodexTranscript(
     source: "codex" as const,
     timestamp,
     preview,
+    summary: null,
     model: primaryModel,
     blendedTokens,
     costUsd,

@@ -348,6 +348,7 @@ export function convertOpenCodeTranscript(
     source: "opencode" as const,
     timestamp,
     preview,
+    summary: null,
     model: primaryModel,
     blendedTokens,
     costUsd,

@@ -295,6 +295,7 @@ export const unifiedTranscriptSchema = z.object({
   source: z.enum(["claude-code", "codex", "opencode", "unknown"]),
   timestamp: z.coerce.date(), // Accept both Date and string (for JSON serialization)
   preview: z.string().nullable(),
+  summary: z.string().nullable().default(null),
   model: z.string().nullable(),
   blendedTokens: z.number(),
   costUsd: z.number(),

@@ -12,3 +12,6 @@ WEB_URL=http://localhost:3000
 
 # API token for Claude Code plugin
 API_TOKEN=dev_token
+
+# For automatic summaries
+OPENROUTER_API_KEY=
